source: Bila shaka Tuliwapa kizazi cha Ibraahiym Kitabu na hekima na tukawapa ufalme mkubwa."[3]
target: "We gave the family of Abraham the Book and Wisdom, and a great kingdom" (An-Nisaa; 54).

source: Natumaini kwamba vijana wengi zaidi watabarikiwa kama mimi, kwa kujifunza kweli juu ya Mungu na Mwana wake."
target: I hope that many more will be blessed, as I was, by learning the truth about God and his Son."

source: Kwa maana walikuja kwake katika hesabu kubwa kutoka Israeli, walipoona kwamba Yahwe Mungu wake alikuwa pamoja naye.
target: For many had left Israel to come to him when they saw that the Lord his God was with him.

source: Leo ninyi mnaletwa uso kwa uso na Mungu mmoja wa kweli ambaye wanadamu hawajawahi kumwona tangu uumbaji, na hakuna kitu maalum kunihusu Mimi.
target: Today you are brought face to face with the one true God that humans have never seen since creation, and there is nothing special about Me.

source: Nao watakuwa salama katikamaghorofa.
target: They are surely in a safe place.

source: "Siyo tu kwamba, Dad, lakini labda mimi na wewe unaweza kufanya show Jerry Springer pamoja.
target: "Not only that, Dad, but maybe you and I can do a Jerry Springer show together.

source: Paulo anaendelea kuzungumzia teolojia.
target: Paul goes on to talk about theology.

source: "Uzazi katika karne ya 21 - Kukusaidia katika safari yako."
target: 'Fertility in the 21st Century - Helping You in Your Journey.'

source: Huyu siye Yesu, mwana wa Yusufu, ambaye twamjua babaye na mamaye?
target: this not Jesus, the son of Joseph, whose father and mother we know?

source: "Kwa $ 10 kwa mwezi, wangeweza kuona picha na video zangu zote mbaya.
target: "For $10 a month, they could see all my naughty photos and videos.

source: Kila mwanamke katika chumba hicho alikuwa katika sehemu tofauti ya safari yao ya IVF.
target: Every woman in that room was in a different part of their IVF journey.

source: (Hatua hii ya mwisho si ya lazima kwa vile angeweza kupaa mbinguni baada ya kuumbwa duniani.
target: (This latter point is not necessary since he could have ascended into heaven after being created on earth.

source: Unahitajika tu kutembelea Kupro kila baada ya miaka 7.
target: You are only required to visit Cyprus every 7 years.

source: Wakati Ni Sasa - Various Artists
target: It's Time - various artists

source: Ndipo akawaonyesha mwana wa mfalme.
target: And he revealed the king's son to them.

source: Vitu vya utukufu vinasemwa juu yako, Ee mji wa Mungu.
target: Glorious things are spoken about you, city of God.

source: Namna gani maoni ya kwamba vitu vya kimwili, kutia ndani dunia, ni viovu?
target: What about the idea that material things, including the earth, are evil?

source: (Desemba 22, 2004) Nina miaka 11 na hadi leo nimekosa ujasiri wa kuwaeleza wengine kuhusu Ufalme wa Mungu.
target: (December 22, 2004) I am 11 years of age, and until now I have lacked the courage to tell others about God's Kingdom.

source: ((Kisha wakarejea kwenye ule ule upotovu wao wakasema: Wewe unajua kwamba hawa hawesemi))
target: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], 'You have already known that these do not speak.'"

source: Na katika Ishara zake ni vyombo vinavyo kwenda na kurejea baharini kama vilima.
target: [42:32] And among His signs are the ships in the sea like mountains.

source: Na linatufariji tumaini kwamba idadi yao itaongezeka, hasa kati ya waamini.
target: And We are comforted by the hope that their number will increase, especially among those who believe.
